headline: Sezzle (SEZL) Among The Tech Stocks To Sell According To Billionaires
summary: Sezzle Inc. (NASDAQ:SEZL) features on the list of tech stocks to sell according to billionaires. Billionaire stake declined from roughly $34.12 million in Q4 2025 to $14.04 million in Q1 2026, a decrease of about $20.07 million.
